title: TCW Launcher 0.3.1 Beta
summary: Windows updater handoff hotfix for clean install, relaunch, and version persistence.
notes: Closes the old launcher before installing the update.
Refreshes the previously launched folder so old shortcuts do not reopen 0.2.0-beta.
Creates Desktop and Start Menu shortcuts to the installed launcher.
Keeps the 0.3.0 community systems, server status, profiles, audio/theme backend, and Galaxy Map fixes.
